title: SchoolSpending
description: A long-form NYC public-school spending / education-indicator observation — one value for one category in one year. The normalized form of IBO's WIDE 'School Spending Since 1990' table (p26e-k6k9, one column per calendar year 1990–2017) and the 'NYC Public School Indicators' file (29nk-6u2k) / 'Education Indicators' interactive. Covers the SchoolBudgetData entity hint.

category.description: Spending or indicator category ('Category' row label, e.g. per-pupil spending, enrollment).

year.description: Year (School Spending columns are calendar/school years 1990–2017).

indicatorValue.description: For non-monetary education indicators (enrollment, counts, rates), the raw numeric value.

unit.description: Unit of the indicator value when not monetary (e.g. students, ratio, percent).
